title: Race Day Cheat Card Data
description: JSON schema for race day cheat card. Write this to /tmp/race_day_data.json. The web server at port 7700 auto-reads it every 30 seconds.

track_dirt.description: Dirt condition: FAST, GOOD, MUDDY, SLOPPY, HEAVY

track_turf.description: Turf condition: FIRM, GOOD, YIELDING, SOFT, HEAVY

advisory.description: Weather advisory if any (shown in red)

day_modifier.description: Day-of-week betting modifier (e.g., 'Monday = Normal sizing', 'Thursday = Reduce 30%')

sources.description: List of expert sources used. Standard 6: SFTB, Racing Dudes, FanDuel Research, Ultimate Capper (Reggie Garrett), Today's Racing Digest, AllChalk AI

sources_note.description: Optional note about sources (e.g., local expert rule applied)

strategy_quote.description: One-sentence strategy summary. Default: 'Stop betting favorites, bet WIN only at 5/1+, use expert picks for exacta/trifecta boxes where their 51% board rate is an edge, and target claiming races with big fields.'

version.description: Version string (e.g., 'v1.0', 'v15.0 FINAL'). Increment on each update.

scratches.description: Scratched horses in format 'R2: Horse Name (#PP)'

races.description: Array of race objects, one per race on the card

type.description: Race type code: CLM, MCL, ALW, AOC, SOC, MOC, MSW, STK

type_label.description: Full label with targeting tag (e.g., 'Claiming [GOLDMINE]', 'Allowance [STANDARD]', 'Maiden Optional Claiming [SKIP]')

distance.description: Distance and surface (e.g., '6F Dirt', '1M Turf', '1 1/16M Dirt')

result.description: Full result string when race is completed (e.g., '#2 Ice Cold Blonde WON ($5.20/$2.80/$2.10), #4 Kitten Gloves 2nd...')

comment.description: Analysis comment about the race result or setup

horses.description: All entered horses for this race

name.description: Horse name. Append '(WON)', '(2nd)', '(3rd)', '(4th)' after result. Append 'SCR' if scratched.

ml.description: Morning line odds (e.g., '5/1', '3/1>5/1' for drift, '6/5*' for favorite)

picks.description: Pick count (e.g., '3/6' meaning 3 of 6 sources). Optional - can be empty.

tier.description: Confidence tier: GREEN=4+ sources, YELLOW=3, ORANGE=2, RED=1

value.description: Value score (e.g., '2.4 VP', '1.8'). VP = Value Play when >= 2.0 at 5/1+ odds.

bold.description: True for top pick in the race (bold name)

type.description: Bet type: WIN, SAVER, Exacta Box, Trifecta Box, Trifecta Key, Super Box, Daily Double, Pick 3

detail.description: Bet details (e.g., '#4 Kitten Gloves + #2 Ice Cold Blonde')

say.description: What to say at the betting window (e.g., '$1 Exacta Box, 4 and 2, Race 2')

pnl.description: P&L tracking entries - one per bet placed
